must_fix_themes: v_graph_health.cluster_count is a 0 placeholder — takeSnapshot must use TS-side connectedComponents instead
graph_health_snapshot.taken_at PK conflicts on same-second or same-day retriggers — use DELETE+INSERT same-transaction
detectCorrection match[0] is conversational phrase, NOT subject — retractedText must store full turnText
findRelatedFacts substring match floods false positives — need tokenize + session isolation or accept [] stub
correction_events.processed_at contract undefined — set in same transaction after health_signals write
scheduler 03:30 too close to backup 03:00 — move to 04:00 UTC and update ARCHITECTURE.md
meta_lessons: Plan audit catches 'looks-correct-but-silent-fail' patterns earlier than code review
4/4 agreement signals a real blindspot — cluster_count placeholder survived 8 commits
Estimation doubling at plan-lock time prevents cascading slippage to later weeks
Sonnet uniquely catches cross-field semantic gaps (retractedText source, processed_at contract)
